locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 大分水岭
locations.summary: 大分水岭（英語：Great Dividing Range），也称东部高地（Eastern Highlands），亦音譯作大狄維亭山脈，是澳大利亚大陆东部沿岸大致与海岸线平行的山脉、丘陵和高原的总称，北起约克角半岛，南至维多利亚州西部，长3…

locations.name: 约克角半岛
locations.summary: 约克角半岛（英語：Cape York Peninsula）是澳大利亚東北部昆士兰州的一个半岛，其北端约克角是澳大利亚大陆的极北点。该半岛在1770年由英国航海家詹姆斯·库克以约克公爵的封号命名。 约克角距新几内亚岛约140公里，两地由托雷…

locations.name: 北領地
locations.summary: 北領地（英語：Northern Territory，縮寫為NT），別稱北方领地地区、北部地方、北澳，是澳大利亞的一個聯邦領地，位於澳洲大陸的中北部，北臨帝汶海、阿拉弗拉海與卡奔塔利亞灣，西接西澳州，南鄰南澳州，東界昆士蘭州。其總面積廣達1…

locations.name: 中澳大利亞
locations.summary: 中澳大利亞（英語：Central Australia），又稱愛麗絲泉地區（Alice Springs Region），是北領地的五個區域之一，其中心城鎮是愛麗絲泉。中澳大利亞位於北領地的南部，和西澳大利亞州及昆士蘭州接壤。中澳大利亞的人口…

relations.subject: Yellow-throated miner
relations.evidence: The yellow-throated miner has the widest distribution of the Manorina species, and it is found across most of Australia, except east of the Great Dividing Range, on Cape York Peninsula, the very north-eastern Northern Territory, and small patches of the driest parts in Central Australia

relations.subject: Yellow-throated miner
relations.evidence: M.|title=The Food of Australian Birds 2 Passerines|date=1984|publisher=Melbourne University Press|location=Melbourne, Australia|isbn=978-0-643-05115-7|pages=199–201|edition=1st}} They are the most widely distributed of the genus Manorina and inhabit open woodlands and scrublands across most of Australia. Yellow-throated miners live in groups, are social, noisy, and defend territory or resources from other avian species
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Yellow-throated miner
relations.evidence: They are found in woodlands and scrublands, including acacia, eucalyptus, mallee, and casuarina. Similar to noisy miners they like edges and so adapt well to disturbed habitat, and can be found in regrowth and along roads or next to cleared lands. They like some undergrowth and recolonize restored habitat, but are rarely found in dense growth like mature mallee. Though they prefer some tree cover, yellow-throated miners will venture further into open areas like pastures than noisy miners will
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
